name: Stir-Fried Asian Tofu (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon tangerine or lemon zest, grated
4 ounces mushrooms, stemmed and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tofu into 3/4-inch squares and marinate in citrus zest and juice; season with salt.
2. Combine hoisin, rice vinegar, soy sauce, sugar, and cornstarch in a separate bowl.
3. In a 12-inch skillet, heat vegetable and sesame oils until very hot.
4. Add garlic and ginger to the pan and stir fry for 10 seconds.
5. Add mushrooms and broccoli, along with some water, then cover and steam for 2 minutes or until the vegetables begin to get tender.
6. Add tofu to the skillet.
7. Stir in the hoisin sauce mixture (cornstarch combined with reserved liquid) and return it to the pan.
8. Cover and simmer for 30 seconds to a minute to thicken the sauce.
9. Season with salt and crushed red pepper.
10. Yield: 2 servings
